hero.title: Ol man i mas i gat rot long baim ol samting long ol narapela kantri
hero.lead: IATF i save helpim ol asosiesen, ol grup, na ol man wan wan long tanim ol samting ol i nidim i kamap olsem open source projek.
support: Ol projek em IATF i orait long en ol i save kamap long GitHub oganaisesen aninit long wanpela kopilef lisens na wanpela ensinia i gat wok long kamapim ol long ples klia.

header.kicker: Pasin bilong mekim wok bilong gavman
header.title: Wanpela gutpela rot bilong ol man long kisim ol program bilong kompiuta

paragraphs: Long rot bilong wanpela fom, olgeta man i ken putim wanpela hevi long IATF. Sapos tim i ken mekim dispela wok, ol bai opim wanpela pablik GitHub ples bilong putim ol dispela samting.

Olgeta projek em ol i orait long en, ol i gat wanpela ples bilong ol man i ken lukim kod, ol samting ol i wokim, ol pepa, na ol tok ol i kamapim, na wanpela ensinia i gat wok long stiaim wok bilong ol.

specCard.title: Pasin bilong mekim wok bilong gavman

terms.definition: Trupela hevi bilong i go long ol narapela hap
Em i stret long mekim wok bilong en na em inap tru long mekim dispela wok

terms.term: Wok Bilong Lukautim Gut Ol Samting

header.title: Em i wok olsem wanem?
header.intro: Dispela piksa i stap liklik tru, olsem na i no hatwok long bihainim rot bilong ol man.

steps.title: Ol i tok ol i mas kisim helpim
paragraphs: Wanpela asosiesen, grup, o wan wan man i ken putim askim bilong helpim ol man i gat bikpela nid long kisim save long ol tok bilong Baibel.
Yu ken salim ol askim bilong yu long Web-sait, o yu ken salim e-mail i go long contact@iatf.cc, o long rot bilong Discord.

steps.title: IATF i skelim
paragraphs: Mipela i skelim olsem dispela wok i stret long mekim, em inap long mekim wok bilong yumi, na em i insait long wanpela open source projek o nogat.

steps.title: Ol i wokim wanpela pablik repozitori (public repository)
paragraphs: Sapos ol i orait long wanpela projek, ol i save kamapim long IATF GitHub oganaisesen aninit long wanpela kopilef lisens.
Dispela haus i kamap ples bilong ol man i ken lukim ol kod, ol tok bilong Baibel, ol pepa, na ol tok ol i kamapim.

steps.title: Enjinia i gat wok long stiaim wok
paragraphs: Ol i makim wanpela enjinia bilong lukautim dispela wok, na ol i mekim wok long ples klia.

header.title: Kisim save long ol wok yu mekim o kirapim wanpela wok

paragraphs: Yu ken yusim dispela buk long lukim ol samting em ol man i save pinis long en, o yu ken kirap long kisim ol samting sapos wanpela hevi i kamap na yu laik mekim wok painimaut long en.
